attempt: Transfer TICKET45's rule: a visual, numerical, or quotient pattern may be promoted only after its symbolic clauses survive same-clause pressure loops, pressure-cycle extraction, and future-lift closure.

bounded_result.discarded_shortcut: finite exact-gap quotient treated as twin-prime infinitude
bounded_result.retained_target: A stable exact-gap symbolic grammar separates gap-2 mass from wider-gap leakage without pressure cycles.
bounded_result.counterexample_target: a leakage pressure cycle or same-clause exact-gap loss loop

obstruction: The current artifact gives a sharper falsification protocol for proof candidates, but it does not close the infinite theorem and it does not produce a certified counterexample.
candidate_theorem: A stable exact-gap symbolic grammar separates gap-2 mass from wider-gap leakage without pressure cycles.
next_experiment: Search exact-gap clauses for pressure cycles before promoting any gap-selector candidate.
claim_boundary: No twin-prime proof and no certified twin-prime counterexample.
